<!-- Chart CH-TIM-11 STREAMGRAPH, role-based (themeable) -->

## STREAMGRAPH chart (CH-TIM-11)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-TIM-11",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "trend",
    "composition",
    "volume"
  ],
  "form": "stacked bands around a centered silhouette baseline",
  "data_required": "ordered periods + 3-4 non-negative components; shape over readability",
  "family": "TIM",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-TIM-04 (readable baselines)",
    "CH-TIM-01 (exact levels)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "any value must be read",
      "use": "CH-TIM-04"
    },
    {
      "when": "levels matter",
      "use": "CH-TIM-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- WARN: editorial texture pieces where the organic silhouette IS the message
- long series where only the total's swell matters

Do NOT use when:
- any reading task at all: every baseline wanders by construction
- few periods (the silhouette needs length to mean anything)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title about the silhouette",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on the total label",
  "x": "period labels",
  "series": "3-4 components bottom-up"
}
```

### Exact layout (px on the canvas, follow literally)
```json
{
  "canvas": {
    "width": 960,
    "height": 540
  },
  "layout": {
    "title": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 56,
      "y_with_eyebrow": 88,
      "size": 24
    },
    "kicker": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 28,
      "w": 24,
      "h": 4
    },
    "eyebrow": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 52,
      "size": 11,
      "letter_spacing": 2
    },
    "source": {
      "x": 32,
      "y": 516,
      "size": 11
    },
    "plot": {
      "left": 96,
      "right": 756,
      "top": 150,
      "bottom": 450
    },
    "x_label": {
      "size": 11,
      "offset": 20
    },
    "segment_label": {
      "size": 12,
      "offset": 10
    }
  }
}
```

### Rules
- centered baseline: -total/2, deterministic
- bands named at right ends, never a legend
- no y axis: a wandering baseline forbids one honestly

### Never do this
- WARN ENTRY: streamgraphs cannot be read, only admired; CH-TIM-04 for any real question
- y axes on a wandering baseline
- legends
- more than 4 bands

### QA before delivering
- [ ] <= 4 bands
- [ ] no y axis
- [ ] names at band ends
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| segments | primary; muted; benchmark -> hairline; gridline |
| x_label | body |
| segment_label | body |
| title | ink |
| source | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
